dayName: Day 3 — still no word from Lowmark

scenarios.title: Watchtower at the Pass
scenarios.target: commission a new watchtower at the southern pass before winter closes the road

contributions.line: Veska meticulously drafted the plans, aware that even a slight miscalculation could cause the whole structure to buckle during the spring melt.
Despite his fatigue, Marek kept a watchful eye on the timber, knowing that a single crooked beam could doom the tower.

scenarios.outcomeNarrative: Veska's precise calculations and Marek's stern oversight couldn't prevent the crew from rushing and taking shortcuts, leading to the tower's fragile construction.
